hintbird:
Chirp!\.\. Chirp!\.\.
Are you feeling lost?\.\.
Confused?
hintbird_zera:
Have you spoken to Zera
while he was at your house..?

If you haven't...\.\.
You might want to start
your journey over...
hintbird_traveller:
Have you helped the Lost 
Traveller find his way?
hintbird_carriage: Why not take a Carriage ride?

You can find the Carriage Service 
in the Village or at the Castle 
Town gate.
hintbird_claire:
Why not say good morning
to Claire?
hintbird_claire_quest:
Maybe you should talk to
Claire again.
hintbird_claire_quest_wait:
Have you visited the Doctor
in the Castle Town?

I think Claire is waiting on
her order...
hintbird_claire_fly:
Why not go on a broom flight 
with Claire?
hintbird_woof:
Maybe you should check on
the Wolf girl by the cliffs?
hintbird_aimottle:
Did you visit Aimottle's room?\.\. 
Her room is located south of your
house!
hintbird_view:
Did you take a look at the pretty 
scenic view north of your house?
hintbird_claire_poster:
You should look at the poster 
hanging up in Claire's room!
hintbird_stump:
Did you check out the tree stump
deep in the forest, surrounded
by many animals?
hintbird_caina_cafe:
Have you said hello to Caina at her 
cafe yet?\.\. You can find the cafe 
in the village!
hintbird_sign:
Did you take a look at the sign 
in the fork in the road?

It's the large arrow signpost that 
points East and West to the 
Village and Castle Town.
hintbird_letter:
Have you seen the letter attached 
to the decaying tree in the Cliff 
area?
You know,\.\. near the Wolf girl's cave.
hintbird_snek:
Have you seen the giant serpent 
located in the Wolf girl's cave?

You know where the Wolf girl's 
cave is..right?
hintbird_lighthouse:
You should look out the window 
from the top of the Lighthouse!

You can find the Lighthouse at the
pier in the Castle Town.
hintbird_pier:
Why not have a seat at the Castle 
Town pier and look off into the 
sea?
hintbird_prince:
Have you spoken to the Prince yet?\.\. 
He's located at the Castle of 
course.
hintbird_prince_index:
Have you taken a peek at the book 
in the Prince's room?
hintbird_dress:
Why not try on some clothes at the 
Tailors' store in the Castle Town?
hintbird_butterfly:
Have you seen the odd butterfly 
that's flying in the middle of a 
ring of flowers deep in the forest?

You can find it near Aimottle's 
place!
hintbird_treasure:
Have you looked in the treasure
chests located underneath the
shack in the Graveyard?
hintbird_prince_parents:
You should check out the statues 
of the previous King and Queen 
at the Castle.
hintbird_???:
Have you seen the mysterious
corpse at the secluded grave?

You can find it by traversing the 
underground maze.

Where is the underground maze?\.\.
Have you looked carefully through
the Castle Town?
hintbird_caina_spar:
Have you met up with Caina at the 
old stump in the forest for a 
little spar?

The stump is surrounded by lots of 
other animals.
hintbird_j*b:
Have you met up with Este at the 
Post Office in the Village?

You should check his desk after 
completing his task!
hintbird_kitty:
Have you met the Tiger Centaur 
BEAST-Type in the forest yet?

You can find her near the entrance 
to the Cliff area.
hintbird_shrine:
Have you visited the Dragon Shrine 
yet?
It's located West of the Village.
hintbird_dragon:
Maybe you should follow the man 
you saw at the Dragon Shrine.

I believe he went near Aimottle's 
place...
hintbird_drink:
Why not grab a drink at the bar 
located on the ship in Castle Town?
hintbird_adventure:
Wanna have some fun on an 
adventure?

Why not follow some Heroes on a 
grand quest?

You should be able to find them if
you keep walking west of the 
Village.
hintbird_journal:
You've collected plenty of journal 
pages, right?

Maybe you should put them
together and read them at the 
Graveyard shack.
hintbird_done:
Chirp!\.\.
You've had a long day!

Maybe you should head home and 
get some sleep?
yolkhouse_veggie:
Some vegetables me and
Claire have been growing.
yolkhouse_well:
I don't really need any 
water right now.
yolkhouse_zera: \SE[1]Of course you're here,\.\. Zera.

\SE[3]You don't look so happy to 
see me.
\SE[1]I'm never happy to see you.

\SE[1]So... What is it.\.\.
Why are you here?

\SE[3]I'm just dropping by to visit 
my favorite forest resident.
\SE[1]And what else?
\SE[3]That's all.

\SE[1]I don't buy that for a 
second.

You planted that nightmare 
I had last night in my
head, right?

\SE[1]Don't give the silent
treatment.

You want me to be useful
to your plans and such, 
right?

Would I really be of any 
use to you when I'm this 
fatigued?

What's the point of doing
this?

\SE[3]It's my way of showing I
care for you.

\SE[1]Maybe you should care a
little less.
yolkhouse_zera_leave:
\SE[1]How long are you gonna
stand next to the house?

\SE[3]How long would you like me 
to stay?

\SE[1]You could leave now if you'd 
like.
forestview_este:
(Why'd you come all the
way up here..?)

If you want, I can fly
you down the mountain.
forestview_este_warped:
\SE[6]Do you want me to fly you 
down the mountain?
forestview_este_no:
\SE[1]I'm good at the moment,
thanks though.
forestbarrier_squirrel2:
(He has an acorn in his
mouth.)
